steps.title: Identify Putirka and Xu's core criticism
steps.content: The key signal is Putirka and Xu's argument that the detected elements could come from multiple sources beyond Earth-like continental crusts—Holland's conclusion doesn't adequately consider these alternatives.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the characterization
steps.content: Putirka and Xu would likely view Holland's conclusion as questionable because it relies heavily on atmospheric traces of individual elements without fully considering alternative minerals or rock types that could also contain those elements. That matches Choice C — As questionable, because it rests on an incomplete consideration of potential sources of the elements detected in white dwarf atmospheres.
